assertions.assertion: Recommends setting options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false in test configuration
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might not know the specific KeyManagement.Enabled option

assertions.assertion: Recommends AddDeveloperSigningCredential(persistKey: false) to avoid disk writes
assertions.rationale: AddDeveloperSigningCredential is known; persistKey: false is somewhat known

assertions.assertion: Warns against hard-coding localhost ports -- use factory.CreateClient() BaseAddress instead
Mentions the risk of sharing HttpClient or ClaimsProvider state across parallel tests
assertions.rationale: Without skill, this specific pitfall about claims provider state leakage might not be covered
